name: Wild Roasted Chicken Wraps
recipeIngredient: Uncle Ben's Long Grain & Wild rice - cooked
Roasted chicken breasts (Tyson Ready to Eat) - chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chopped roasted chicken with the cooked wild rice and ranch salad dressing.
2. Spoon about one-third of the mixture onto a flat flour tortilla.
3. Add shredded lettuce on top of the filling.
4. Fold the sides over the filling and roll up tightly to form a wrap.
Source: Uncle Ben's
Notes: Made this 7-17-97 using thinly sliced pork roast for the chicken. Very quick meal and tasty too.
